title: Poof Puuf!
description: Adds a synchronized “poof” sound to mob death smoke animations for a subtle, immersive audio touch.
body:
PoofPuff

PoofPuff is a small, lightweight mod that enhances Minecraft’s mob death feedback by adding a satisfying “poof” sound effect.

When a mob dies and disappears in a cloud of smoke, PoofPuff plays a synchronized audio cue that matches the visual effect, making mob deaths feel more polished and expressive without changing gameplay mechanics.

This mod is designed to be subtle, immersive, and completely vanilla-friendly.

✨ Features

Synchronized Death Sound
Plays a “poof” sound exactly when mobs vanish in their smoke animation.

Purely Audio Enhancement
No gameplay changes, no balance impact — only improved audiovisual feedback.

Vanilla-Friendly & Lightweight
Blends naturally with Minecraft’s existing sounds and effects.

Server & Client Compatible
Works correctly in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments.

Plug & Play
No configuration required. Install and enjoy.

🎯 Why PoofPuff?

If you enjoy small details that make the game feel more alive and responsive, PoofPuff adds that extra bit of charm without clutter or complexity.

📦 Compatibility & Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21.11

Loader: Fabric

Dependencies:

Fabric API
